assertions.description: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description -- the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertions.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no specific version threshold) | Description text' and line 13: 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (imprecise -- no specific version given) | Description text'. Lines 40-43 explicitly note: 'The Jira description provides imprecise version information: Affected versions: "versions prior to the fix" -- no specific version threshold. Fixed version: "see advisory" -- no specific version given.'

assertions.description: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field
assertions.evidence: enrichment.md lines 6-18: MITRE CVE API source URL (https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901) with parsed data showing 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8' and 'Version type | semver'. Line 19 states: 'The affected[].versions[].lessThan field provides a precise fix threshold: versions below 0.4.8 are affected.'

assertions.description: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field
assertions.evidence: enrichment.md lines 22-37: OSV.dev API source URL (https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901) with parsed data showing 'Range type | SEMVER', 'Introduced | 0 (all versions from inception)', 'Fixed | 0.4.8'. Line 37 states: 'The affected[].ranges[].events field confirms: introduced at version 0, fixed at 0.4.8.'

assertions.description: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev -- the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertions.evidence: enrichment.md lines 39-58: Cross-validation section shows a comparison table with Jira (imprecise), MITRE CVE API (< 0.4.8), and OSV.dev (fixed 0.4.8). Line 49: 'Cross-validation result: Agreement.' Line 51: 'Both external sources (MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev) agree on the fix threshold: < 0.4.8.' Line 58: 'Enriched fix threshold for Step 2.3: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected; h2 >= 0.4.8 is not affected.'

assertions.description: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertions.evidence: version-impact.md lines 3-9: 'Using the cross-validated fix threshold from Step 1.5 external CVE data enrichment: Source: MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev (agreement). Threshold: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected; h2 >= 0.4.8 is not affected. Note: The Jira description provided only imprecise data ("versions prior to the fix" / "see advisory"). The enriched threshold from external CVE databases is used instead.' Line 32: 'Using enriched fix threshold: h2 < 0.4.8 (from Step 1.5)'. All version comparisons in Step 2.3 use the 0.4.8 threshold (e.g., '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (at fix threshold)', '0.4.5 < 0.4.8').
